title: Italian Options Grosgrain Ribbon 25mm, Strong Plain Gold Ribbon for Bows, Wedding, Crafting, Sewing, Hair Accessories, Gift Wrap, 25 mm x 10 Metre Roll, Gold
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: Available in over 30 stunning colours and 4 widths, our premium grosgrain ribbons are made from 100% polyester, ideal for hair bows, gift wrapping, clothing, and crafts.

GROSGRAIN DESIGN: This strong and durable matt craft ribbon exudes a soft and delicate appearance with a distinctive, sophisticated rib pattern running from edge to edge, making it a luxurious addition to any project.

PASTELS AND BRIGHTS: Elevate cosmetics, scented products, millinery, chocolates, gift wrap, paper crafts, and sewing with this elegant ribbon, available in a range of vivid and pastel colours, including burgundy, baby blue, navy, pink, and black.

VERSATILE USE: Perfect for Christmas, weddings, baby and bridal showers, Valentine’s and birthdays, our premium ribbons make every celebration memorable. REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) and OEKO-TEX 100 certified to ensure safety and quality standards.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
